name: Borth to Ynyslas Dunes & Sarn
best_season: All year (low tide reveals ancient forest)
highlights: Sunken forest stumps at low tide, then wild dune NNR at the Dyfi estuary mouth.
points_of_interest: 5000-year-old petrified forest (sunken); Ynyslas NNR visitor centre
viewpoints: Panorama over Dyfi estuary to Aberdyfi
parking_start: Borth seafront or Ynyslas NNR car park
food_drink_nearby: Victoria Inn Borth; Ynyslas Beach Café (seasonal)
hazards_notes: Forest stumps visible only at very low tide — check tide times
